Notice of destruction Of certificate
numbered A-42 of the stock Of The
Washington Water Power Company
and of application to have duplicate
certificate or a certificate in lieu of
the destroyed certificate issued.


Notice Is hereby given that the I'M
dersigned, on the 26th day of Fehru-
airy. 1908, was the owner and had
the possession of certificate numbered
A-42 of the capital stock of The
Washington Water Power Company,
corporation under the laws Of the
state of Washington with its princi-
pal place of business at Spokane,
Washington. and that such certificate
was destroyed by fire. which fire oc-
CURED at the place of business of
the Beech-Nut Packing Company, of
and at Canojoharie, N. Y, on the said
date. and that l have made proof
of the loss and destruction and own
ership of the said stock to The
Washington Water Power Company,
and hereby give notice, as required
by the bylaws OF that company, Of
the application to it for the issuance
of certificate in lieu of the ono
so destroyed as aforesaid or a dupli-
cate thereof. which application will
be heard and considered by the board
of trustees of the said company on
the 18th day of May. 1908.


Dated this eth day Of March. 1908.


WALTER Fl. LIPE,


AS Administrator of the Estate Of


e. K Goodall Deceased
